summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Epic Grind productivity app. All core features working correctly including RPG mechanics, date navigation, mission management, and LocalStorage persistence.

design_issues.issue: Missing Dialog description causing accessibility warning
design_issues.impact: Console warning only, no functional impact

passed_tests: Date navigation with Previous/Next day buttons works correctly
Date format displays properly as 'D Month YYYY' (e.g., '2 March 2026')
Runes wallet displays correctly and starts at 0
Progress ring shows 0% when no tasks exist
Add Mission button opens modal successfully
Mission creation with name, rank selection (D/C/B/A/S), and repeat option works
Missions appear in list after creation
Runes calculation accurate: D+10, C+20, B+50, A+100, S+200
Completing missions adds correct runes (verified: 330 total from D+C+A+S)
Delete mission functionality removes from list and adjusts runes
Rank colors display correctly (D-Gray, C-Green, B-Blue, A-Purple, S-Gold)
Daily recurring tasks appear on subsequent days
Task completion status is date-specific (different days have separate completion)
Runes wallet total persists across date navigation
Visual design elements: dark theme, glow effects, rank-based styling
